monitor_the_situation.title: US Strikes Iran; Iran Retaliates Against Gulf States, US Bases in Persian Gulf
— S4 · Conflict · Persian Gulf · 17h ago. Iran has reportedly launched attacks targeting Bahrain and Kuwait in the Persian Gulf, escalating regional tensions.
US Expands Airstrikes Across Southern Iran After Ceasefire Collapses
Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles and Drones at Kuwait and Bahrain; Air Defenses Intercept Most Projectiles
Iran Strikes US Fifth Fleet Headquarters in Bahrain With Ballistic Missiles and Drones, Sirens Sound Across Gulf States

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 2d ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
